### Summary

A short description of what this PR changes and why.

### Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` clean
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` clean
- [ ] `mypy` clean
- [ ] `pytest` green
- [ ] New or changed behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Docs / README / docstrings updated where relevant
- [ ] No real user captures, spreadsheets, or identifiable data checked in
- [ ] Commit message follows the style in CONTRIBUTING.md

### Screenshots / output samples

(Optional: paste xlsx screenshots, CLI output, or diff highlights that
make the change easier to review.)
